messages.content: 请帮我翻译成英文
Please help me translate it into English.
非常感谢你的回复和提议
Thank you very much for your response and suggestions.
让我感觉到无奈的是，我在7月6号已经提交资料给他们，之后让催促他们进行再次inspection，但是直到今天19号才收到他们directions 和报价
I feel helpless because I submitted the documents to them on July 6th and urged them to conduct another inspection. However, I only received their directions and quotation today, on the 19th.
我感到非常无奈
I feel extremely frustrated.
我提供了新的资料以便安排新的检查
I provided new information to arrange for a new inspection.
隔天就催促他们尽快安排检查
The next day, I urged them to arrange the inspection as soon as possible.
我想知道以后如何可以避免这种情况
I would like to know how to avoid this situation in the future.
毕竟公司真的很难承受这样的巨款
After all, it's really difficult for the company to bear such a large sum of money.
这样的巨款很难承受
It is challenging to bear such a huge amount of money.
很难承受这个巨额账单
It is difficult to bear such a large bill.
